content.description: Welcome to my home on the internet! I am a guy who loves robust technology and works to make virtual worlds entertaining, engaging and easy to use spaces.

projects.title: projects
projects.subtitle: This website is intended to act as a log of some of my fondest initiatives in the past, present and future. It has borne many iterations of functionality improvements, and will no doubt continue to do so over time, with the last major sprint concluding on

project_list.title: Degree Planner
project_list.subtitle: Web Application
project_list.description: An application that allows students to visually plan out their education. Users interact with dynamic charts that outline necessary courses and their prerequisites for each degree path.

project_list.title: Raspberry Pong
project_list.subtitle: Robotics
project_list.description: Co-engineered a robotic arm that interacts with various motors and sensors in order to detect a red cup on a table. The arm then adjusts all of its angles of trajectory to throw a ping pong ball into the cup with 100% accuracy.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: With the world of technology expanding at an incredible speed and on what seems to have nearly infinite possibilities, my passion for this world is always leading me to new tools and technologies. Some I like, some I learned to love and some I absolutely loathe.
skills.forward: I therefore decided that it makes sense to also log a priority of tools that updates as I do. Almost like an ultimate team card, or MyPlayer statline for the world of software development.
skills.goal: Some new technologies I think are cool and will learn in 2022 are:

content.p1: Technology has been a passion and interest of mine for as long as I can remember. Looking back, I can recall many milestones of advancements throughout the decades. Some of my most treasured eras were times filled with CD-ROMs, Nintendo Gamecube and Mapquest directions. However, it is undeniable that the current era of technology is much more convenient and superior, and will only continue to do so in each coming year, month and even day. I am in constant awe of its developments and work towards contributing my own ideas and innovations into its boundless space.
content.p2: I was in my undergrad when I recognized the capabilities of the tools I continue to learn. While earning my Honours Specialization in Computer Science at the University of Western Ontario, I was exposed to best software practices and implemented them in numerous projects. My first major project with friends (Raspberry Pong) remains my favourite to this day. I have yet to forget the professor's awestruck reaction after seeing the hardware and software we built successfully execute 15/15 throws over 5 different cup placements.

icons.description: I like to try new ways of improving what is in place.
I enjoy working alongside others and want to help them succeed with me.
I quickly develop new skills, while also being able to adapt to new environments.

contact.title: Let's build something awesome together!
contact.subtitle: Send me a message and I'll get back to you shortly.
